title: arabis perstellata var. shortii
intro: Arabis perstellata var. shortii, also known as Mountain Rockcress, is a plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Arabis perstellata var. shortii include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
